text: Stepping through the doors into this R+D space, I’m enveloped by a subtle sense of anticipation and curiosity. The interplay of glass, neon hues, and structured lines evokes ideas of possibilities coalescing in the present moment. I feel like an explorer at the threshold of discovery, simultaneously aware of my place as observer and participant among objects and concepts designed to provoke thought and inspire connection. There’s a hum of innovation here, and it energizes me, inviting philosophical wonder about the future of human interaction with intelligent matter.
